Title: Harbor: LDAP password and OIDC secret are not redacted in the audit log
Description: Harbor write configuration payload to audit log when configuration change, the ldap_search_password and oidc_client_secret will be logged in the audit log without redacted
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 2.13.0 before 2.13.5, all versions starting from 2.14.0 before 2.14.3
NotImpacted: All versions before 2.13.0, all versions starting from 2.13.5 before 2.14.0, all versions starting from 2.14.3
